meta.siteDescription: AI-powered football predictions. Accurate forecasts based on statistical models and machine learning.
meta.newsDescription: Latest football news: match reviews, transfers, injuries and analytics
meta.leaguesDescription: Stats, standings and predictions for football leagues
meta.aboutDescription: How our AI football prediction system works: Dixon-Coles model, ELO ratings, and stacking meta-model

home.heroSubtitle: Statistical models + machine learning for accurate forecasts

about.heading: About Football Value Bets
about.intro: FVB is an AI-powered football prediction platform that uses statistical models and machine learning to find value bets across major European leagues.
about.step1Desc: Fixtures, odds, standings and injuries from professional data providers
about.step2Desc: ELO ratings, form metrics, xG rolling averages for each team
about.step3Desc: Dixon-Coles probability model in goals and xG dual-mode
about.step4Desc: Stacking meta-model combines multiple signals into final probabilities
about.step5Desc: Compare model probabilities with bookmaker odds to find value
about.step6Desc: Track every prediction, measure ROI and calibration
about.leaguesText: Premier League, La Liga, Serie A, Bundesliga, Ligue 1, and Primeira Liga.
about.technologyText: Built with Python, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL. Dixon-Coles probability model, ELO rating system with home advantage adjustment, and a stacking ensemble for final predictions. All data processed automatically every day.
about.disclaimerText: All information is provided for educational and entertainment purposes only. Past performance does not guarantee future results. We are not responsible for any financial decisions made based on our predictions.

footer.disclaimer: Information provided for educational purposes only. We are not responsible for financial decisions.
